payload.title: Auto-wire the agent into scope serve / scope sync --watch
payload.description: Make it zero-command: `scope serve` auto-starts the RemoteSyncAgent when .scope/remote.json + a credential ($SCOPE_API_KEY) are present, and add `scope sync --watch` for an explicit foreground live-sync. `scope sync` (one-shot) stays as the manual/CI fallback. Status surfaced in the CLI banner + the web live indicator (connected / syncing / offline). Clean start/stop + teardown.
